resources.string: Push projects via VSCode extension\nor tap + to import a project
Configure server address and log in to bind device
Log in to bind this device and manage it from the console

Instructions:

1. Enter the IP address and port of the remote console
2. Log in to bind the device and obtain an auth token
3. Tap Save — the engine will auto-connect
4. Config file: /sdcard/Yyds.Auto/server.conf
Tell me what you want to do and I\'ll operate the phone for you
Enter an API Key to get started. Supports Doubao, Qwen, GPT-4o
Tell AI what you want to do…
Get API Key from Volcengine console
Also send UI tree XML to improve decision accuracy
Compare screenshots after execution to verify results (disable to save tokens)
Follow these steps to complete the initial setup and run your first automation script in minutes.
First-time activation required. If the engine status shows \"Not activated\", tap it for the activation guide. Supports ROOT, Shizuku, or PC ADB.
Switch to the \"Scripts\" tab. Create a blank project or place your Python script folder under /sdcard/Yyds.Py/ on the device.
Tap the ▶ button next to a project in the script list to start it. Logs are displayed in real time on the log page.
Install the \"Yyds.Auto\" VSCode extension and enter the device IP to connect. Supports code editing, live push, screenshot debugging, and more.
Enable the \"Floating Control Window\" on this page to quickly start/stop scripts from any screen without switching back to this app.
Worker process not running. This device lacks the required permissions. Choose one of the following methods to activate.
No ROOT needed — install Shizuku and start via Wireless Debugging
Connect to a PC and activate via VSCode extension or ADB command
💡 After authorization, return to Home to auto-detect and start the engine
Select a .yyp.zip project package from file manager
Quick scan of Download, Documents, etc.
YY Auto Input (tap to switch back)
Delete project \"%s\"? This cannot be undone.
Tell me what you want to do, I will operate the phone for you
Go to Volcengine console to get API Key
Send UI tree XML to improve decision accuracy
Compare screenshots after execution to verify (disable to save tokens)

Instructions:

1. Enter the IP address and port of the remote console
2. Log in to bind device and get auth token
3. Click save, engine will auto-read config and connect
4. Config file: /sdcard/Yyds.Auto/server.conf
Worker process not running. Device lacks required permissions. Choose one of the following methods to activate.
No ROOT needed. Install Shizuku and start via wireless debugging
Connect to PC, activate via VSCode plugin or ADB command
💡 After authorization, return to home to auto-detect and start engine
Select .yyp.zip project package from file manager
Quick scan Download, Documents and other folders
Push projects via VSCode plugin or tap + at bottom right to import
YY Auto Input (tap to switch back)
Request failed, check if engine is running
Worker process not started. Ensure device has ROOT or SHELL permission

No .yyp.zip project packages found
in Download or Documents folders.

Place packages in those folders or use "Pick File" to import.
⚠ Logged in but device not bound
Password must be at least 6 characters
%1$s not running. Device lacks required permissions. Choose one of the following to activate.
Please use Magisk, KernelSU or APatch to obtain ROOT permission, then authorize this app.\n\nReturn to home after authorization to auto-detect and start engine.
Shizuku is a ROOT-free authorization tool, best choice for non-ROOT devices.

Shizuku is installed but not running.

• Android 11+: Open Shizuku → Start via Wireless Debugging
• Below Android 11: Connect PC via ADB

Return to this app after starting.
Please tap \"Allow\" in the authorization dialog.\n\nIf no dialog appears, you may have previously denied. Please manually authorize in Shizuku app.

Activate via PC ADB without ROOT.

Option 1: VSCode plugin one-click activation
Install Yyds.Auto plugin and click "ADB Activate Engine".

Option 2: Manual ADB command
1. Enable USB Debugging or Wireless Debugging
2. Connect device and run activation command

See online docs for details.
Engine not started, cannot switch touch mode
Tap to open floating log console
Permission not granted, tap to configure
Tap to open floating control window
The floating control window displays script projects on any screen for quick start/stop.\n\nRequires \"Display over other apps\" permission.
The floating log console shows real-time script logs on any screen, with drag, resize and filter support.\n\nRequires \"Display over other apps\" permission.
Please search and install Shizuku manually
Cannot open Shizuku, please start manually
Shizuku not installed or version too old
Shizuku not running, please start Shizuku first
2. Android 11+ can start via Wireless Debugging on phone
3. Below Android 11, connect PC and run ADB command
4. After starting, return to this app and authorize
5. Note: Shizuku needs to be restarted after each reboot
Shizuku not detected. Non-ROOT devices need Shizuku to start the engine
Shizuku installed but not running. Please open Shizuku app and start the service
Shizuku is running. Authorize to start the engine
Starting engine via Shizuku, please wait…
Shizuku engine start failed. Check Shizuku status and retry
Reset all config items to default?
This project has no config UI
Create desktop shortcut for one-tap launch
This app requires ROOT or Shizuku permission to run automation scripts.\n\nPlease ensure the device is rooted or Shizuku is installed.
Notification permission is needed to show engine status and script controls.
\"Display over other apps\" permission is needed for the floating control window.
Engine not running, please start engine first
Check if this package is available
An operation is in progress, please wait
Cannot connect to worker process\nPlease start engine from sidebar and retry
Failed to get package list\nPlease check Python environment deployment

Package "%1$s" not found on PyPI.

Please check the spelling.

Raw output:
%2$s
Check if the package is available
Engine not started. Ensure device has ROOT access
Failed to get package list\nPlease check Python environment
An operation is in progress, please wait
Uninstall "%1$s" (%2$s)?\n\nOther packages depending on it may be affected.

Package "%1$s" not found on PyPI.

Please check the spelling.

Raw output:
%2$s
Automatically run script when app opens
Prevent screen from turning off during execution
Display floating log window during execution
Protect source code with AES-256-GCM encryption
✗ Engine failed to start. Ensure ROOT access is granted
Invalid operation! Download URL not configured
To add a configuration UI, create a ui.yml file in the script project directory.\nUsers can adjust script parameters here, read via Config.read_config_value().
No configurable items for this script
Error reading YAML UI config file
Automatically run script when app opens
Engine failed to start. Ensure ROOT access is granted
Automatically close app when script stops
Prevent screen from turning off during script execution
Show real-time log output at the bottom
Go to Volcengine console to get API Key
Go to Alibaba Cloud DashScope console to get API Key
Go to OpenAI Platform to get API Key
Enter OpenAI-compatible API endpoint and key
Save failed, check if engine is running
❌ Request failed, check if engine is running
Please start the automation engine first
Widget analysis failed: automation engine not responding
Please tap to select a widget first
Please check if the device time is correct or if the app version is outdated, which may cause issues!
If Lanzou link doesn\'t open, tap again to try a different link

The floating control window displays the script project list on any screen for quick start/stop.

Requires "Display over other apps" permission.

After tapping "Go to Settings", find this app and enable the permission.
Cannot open settings page, please grant floating window permission manually
Notification permission not enabled, control window cannot display
Hide the control panel from display
Volume+ to start, Volume- to stop
All contents in the folder will be deleted recursively
Preview not supported for this file type
Select app to clone icon from
Please test the script on this device first
Packaging may take a few minutes
Generated APK is in the Download directory
First install requires allowing unknown sources
Check log output if you encounter issues
App package name for unique identification
Show run log at bottom of screen
Module installed, engine starts on boot

Install the auto-start module to %s framework.

The engine will start automatically on boot without opening the app.

Reboot required to take effect.
Please ensure your root manager is running and try again
Boot auto-start module installed successfully!\n\nThe engine will start automatically after next reboot.
Are you sure to uninstall the boot auto-start module?\n\nThe engine will no longer start on boot.
